\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5852 introduces Gyromagnetic Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}_{total} = T_{gyro} + T_{field} - U_{mag} - U_{constraint} + \mathcal{L}_{coupling} \end{equation}
